speed.snippet: Fast lunch service and a very friendly team.
speed.reply: Thanks for highlighting speed. We will keep this pace so every visit stays smooth.

service.snippet: Great atmosphere, but we waited a bit during peak hours.
service.reply: Thanks for the feedback. We are adjusting staffing at peak times to reduce waiting.

clarity.snippet: Very clean and clear from check-in to checkout.
clarity.reply: Great to hear. We will keep prioritizing clarity and comfort across every stay.

value.snippet: Great value for money and ideal for families.
value.reply: Thank you for recommending us. We will keep protecting that value every week.

examples.title: Reply examples
examples.subtitle: Three tones to publish fast and stay on-brand.

empathy.reply: Thanks for sharing this with us. It helps a lot, and we already applied improvements.

operations.reply: Thank you for your feedback. We reviewed our process to reduce waiting times during peak hours.

upsell.reply: We are glad you enjoyed the experience. On your next visit, try our special selection.

mini.title: Studio + Planner + Export in one weekly routine

items.studio: Create Story or Feed visuals from templates in a few clicks.
items.planner: Schedule posts and mark them as published.
items.export: Download a weekly ZIP pack with everything ready.

fast.q: How fast do I see value?
fast.a: Usually in the first session: reply, idea, and planner in under 5 minutes.

editing.a: Yes. Everything is reviewable and editable before posting or sending.

catalan.a: Yes. You can work in Catalan, Spanish, and English.

hero.title: Clear plans to sell more with less work
hero.subtitle: From review to post and planner in minutes.

value.closedFlow: Plan and publish with a closed-loop workflow

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: For businesses getting started with a simple weekly routine.
starter.b2: Inbox + Growth + Studio ready in minutes

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For teams that need publishing consistency and performance visibility.

agency.name: Agency
agency.desc: For multi-location operations with priority support.

robotic.a: No. Output follows your brand tone and you can always edit before publishing.

edit.a: Yes. The workflow is built so you review, adjust, and publish only when ready.

catalan.a: Yes. You can work in Catalan, Spanish, and English across replies and content.

export.q: What if I leave? Can I export?
export.a: Yes. Weekly ZIP exports include planner, texts, and assets so you keep everything.

integrations.a: Connect Make/Zapier webhook in Settings. When you click “Send to publish”, the standard payload is sent.

limits.a: Yes, by plan. Where it says unlimited, fair use applies to keep service stable.

safety.panicDesc: Stops all AI generation for this business. Activate in case of reputational crisis or incident.
safety.constraintsDesc: Add phrases the AI must NEVER use. One per line.
safety.constraintsPlaceholder:
Don't mention specific prices
Don't say 'we apologize for the inconvenience'
Don't use 'dear customer'
safety.defaultsInfo: Anti-robot defaults: "Dear customer", "We are thrilled", "We regret any inconvenience", apologizing more than once, generic corporate phrases. Always active, no need to add them.

language.title: Interface language
language.desc: Change the language of the entire dashboard. The preference is saved to your profile.

growth.title: Growth Links
growth.createDesc: Paste your Google review link to generate a QR code and short link with tracking.
growth.noLinksDesc: Create your first growth link to start collecting reviews.

generate.a: OpinIA analyzes each review with AI (classification + business context) and generates 3 reply options with different tones. You choose, edit if needed, and publish. No reply is posted automatically.

providers.q: Which AI providers do you use?
providers.a: We use multiple AI providers depending on your account configuration. The system includes automatic fallback: if one provider fails, another takes over.

training.q: Are my data used to train models?
training.a: No. Reviews are sent to AI providers only to generate replies. We use zero-retention policies when available. See our Privacy Policy for more details.

gbp.q: Can I connect Google Business Profile?
gbp.a: Yes, GBP integration is in pilot phase. For now you can import reviews manually or via CSV. Direct connection will enable automatic import and publishing.

memory.a: Business Memory stores verified facts about your business (hours, prices, policies). AI uses them as context to generate accurate replies. The more you feed it, the better the results.

incorrect.q: What if AI generates incorrect information?
incorrect.a: Guardrails detect prices, hours, and unverified data, then alert you. Always review replies before publishing. Accuracy improves as you enrich your Business Memory.

plans.a: Starter ({starter}/mo), Pro ({pro}/mo), and Agency ({agency}/mo). Check the pricing page for the latest limits and features.

cancel.q: How do I cancel my account?
cancel.a: You can cancel anytime from Settings > Plan & Usage. Data is retained for 90 days and then permanently deleted.
